dosingInfo.rawDosageText: 2 DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION Sirolimus tablets are to be administered orally once daily, consistently with or without food [ see Dosage and Administration ( 2.5 ), Clinical Pharmacology ( 12.3 ) ]. Tablets should not be crushed, chewed or split. Patients unable to take the tablets should be prescribed the solution and instructed in its use.
